summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing for CVF PT app. Backend: 96.6% pass rate (56/58 tests). Frontend: All major flows tested successfully including admin dashboard, client management, sessions, programs, messages, and role-based access control.

minor_issues.issue: Test used wrong endpoint - actual endpoint is /api/progress/clients/:clientId/metrics
minor_issues.impact: None - endpoint exists at correct path

minor_issues.issue: Booking approval returned 404 when Coach Jordan tried to approve Sarah Martinez's booking
minor_issues.impact: None - this is CORRECT behavior (ownership enforcement)
minor_issues.status: Working as designed - Sarah belongs to Marcus, not Jordan

passed_tests: ✅ Auth: Admin login with correct credentials returns token + role admin
✅ Auth: Wrong password returns 401
✅ Auth: Coach Jordan and Alex login successfully
✅ Auth: Client login successful
✅ Auth: GET /auth/me resolves role and profile correctly
✅ OWNERSHIP (CRITICAL): Coach Jordan's client list does NOT include Sarah Martinez (correct)
✅ OWNERSHIP (CRITICAL): Coach Jordan GET /clients/{sarah_id} returns 404 (ownership enforced)
✅ OWNERSHIP (CRITICAL): Client token GET /clients returns 403 (role enforcement)
✅ Invitation flow: Non-invited email returns 403 with friendly 'contact your coach' message
✅ Invitation flow: Coach creates client, toggles invite, signup succeeds and links auth_user_id
✅ Clients: GET, POST, PUT operations work correctly
✅ Sessions: Create, edit, complete, cancel all working
✅ Sessions: Complete session decrements credits (tested with 0 balance)
✅ Sessions: Completing already-completed session returns 400
✅ Session notes: Create with shared_with_client true/false
✅ Session notes: Client GET /sessions/client/mine returns sessions
✅ Programs: Create program with exercises, assign to client, duplicate assign returns 409
✅ Programs: Client GET /programs/client/assigned works
✅ Messages: Coach sends message, client views messages, threads endpoint works
✅ Bookings: Client creates booking (future time), coach sees pending bookings
✅ Bookings: Past time returns 400
✅ Waivers: GET /waivers/latest works
✅ Waivers: Client signs waiver, re-sign returns 409
✅ Waivers: Coach signs paper waiver for client
✅ Waivers: Admin creates new version (append-only), non-admin returns 403
✅ Payments: GET /payments/config returns configured:false (Stripe not configured)
✅ Payments: Client POST /payments/checkout returns 503 with friendly message
✅ Payments: Coach records manual purchase and adds credits
✅ Payments: GET /payments/history works for client and coach
✅ Payments: GET /payments/credits works
✅ Admin: GET /admin/coaches (admin only), coach returns 403
✅ Admin: PATCH /admin/clients/:id/reassign moves client between coaches
✅ Admin: POST /packages creates package
✅ FRONTEND: Admin login loads dashboard with stat tiles (TODAY: 5, CLIENTS: 7, REQUESTS: 2, UNREAD: 0)
✅ FRONTEND: Dashboard shows today's sessions (Sarah Martinez, David Chen, Emily Romero)
✅ FRONTEND: Booking requests from Sarah Martinez visible with approve/decline buttons
✅ FRONTEND: Clients page lists 7 active clients with search and Add client button
✅ FRONTEND: Sessions page shows filter chips (Upcoming, Today, Past, Cancelled)
✅ FRONTEND: Sessions page shows pending booking requests banner
✅ FRONTEND: Programs page accessible
✅ FRONTEND: Messages page shows thread list with conversations
✅ FRONTEND: Admin page shows stats, coaches list (Alex, Jordan, Marcus), tabs for Waivers and Packages
✅ FRONTEND: Navigation between all coach pages works smoothly
✅ FRONTEND: Dark theme applied correctly throughout
✅ FRONTEND: Mobile-first design with good spacing and contrast
additional_notes: Backend is fully functional with excellent ownership enforcement
All CRITICAL tests passed: auth flows, ownership rules, invitation-only signup, session credit decrement, waiver append-only, Stripe graceful degradation
Frontend UI is polished with dark theme, good spacing, and mobile-first design
Stripe intentionally NOT configured - 'payments not configured' is expected behavior, not a bug
Sarah Martinez has NOT signed waiver yet (expected state for testing)
Database is real Supabase (persistent) - test data created with unique timestamps
Client login and client-facing pages were not fully tested due to timeout, but backend APIs for client role all passed
